baselines_run_on_same_inputs.evidence: synthetic comparison tables include RhoDyn and baseline rows for the same case_id values

failure_behavior_reported.evidence: failure_behavior_summary.csv includes an invalid trajectory schema rejection

negative_or_inconclusive_case_correctly_.evidence: ambiguous synthetic cases are returned as inconclusive by RhoDyn decision rules

performance_measured_on_representative_s.evidence: performance_summary.csv includes RhoDyn and amplitude baselines at 10, 100, and 1000 traces

public_fixture_benchmarks_run_where_inpu.evidence: public_fixture_benchmark_summary.csv summarizes retained Stage 3 fixture tables

residence_amplitude_disagreement_with_kn.evidence: counterexample_amplitude_only is correctly bounded by RhoDyn and miscalled by amplitude_peak_threshold

sensitivity_to_windows_margins_grouping_.evidence: window, margin, grouping, and sample-size sensitivity tables are written

stop_condition_no_added_value_beyond_bas.evidence: RhoDyn detects at least one residence/amplitude disagreement with known truth

synthetic_truth_outcomes_match_known_tru.evidence: RhoDyn method rows match known synthetic truth labels

interpretation_boundary: Stage 7.2 benchmarks test method behavior and retained public fixture summaries. This is not a new biological demonstration, does not add independent biological evidence, and does not imply that RhoDyn generated the RhoA/microglia manuscript results.
next_phase: Stage 7.3 Independent public live-cell signaling demonstrations
stage_label: Benchmark harness against baselines and alternatives
